title: Document provider backpressure configuration
goal: Document the provider concurrency backpressure environment variable so users can tune or disable the rate-limit governor behavior introduced in issue #27.
completionConditions: A user-facing configuration document mentions JCODE_PROVIDER_MAX_CONCURRENT_PER_MODEL.
The documentation explains default behavior, how to disable the semaphore with 0, and the scope as per provider/model.
The change is verified with formatting/markdown-safe checks and git diff checks.
notes: Small docs-only follow-up after commit 30d43ae9. Prefer existing environment/config docs over creating a new doc if a suitable location exists.
